title: Medical device shortage: 840 Ventilator System - Neomode Option Upgrade Kit and Accessories - Canada.ca

## Medical device shortage: 840 Ventilator System - Neomode Option Upgrade Kit and Accessories
The 840 Ventilator  System - Neomode Option Upgrade Kit and Accessories is currently reported as a  medical device shortage through the Interim  Order to help prevent or alleviate shortages in relation to COVID-19 . For a full list of shortages, refer to the medical  device shortages: list of shortages .
Posted on 2020-05-04
